title: Allogene Therapeutics Reports Interim Futility Analysis from Pivotal ALPHA3 Trial
text: Allogene ALPHA3 Interim Futility Analysis (April 13, 2026). Primary Results: Cema-cel 58.3% MRD negativity vs 16.7% observation (41.6% absolute difference). Day 45 ctDNA: 97.7% median reduction (treatment) vs 26.6% increase (control). Safety: No CRS, ICANS, GvHD. 10 of 12 treatment patients outpatient only. No treatment-related hospitalizations. Clinical Context: Off-the-shelf CAR T delivery in community setting could expand access beyond specialty centers. Timeline: ~220 patients enrollment by end 2027. Interim EFS analysis mid-2027. Primary analysis mid-2028.
